CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table.   
The third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the reason for updating the document . Column 5 should include the names of the author (s) 
doing the changes. Including the name in column 6 shows that the document has been validated by the 
TAC/MFC PQ leader or deputy (or TAC/MFC PQ leader or the deputy). This validation means th e 
document was checked for contents, formats and consistency with other documents.

ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Description 
(A)ATSR (Advanced) Along Track Scanning Radiometer 
AASTI Arctic and Antarctic Surface Temperatures from thermal Infrared 
satellite radiometers 
AMSR Advanced Microwave Scanning Radiometer 
Argo Array for Real -Time Geostrophic Oceanography . International 
program that measures water properties across the world’s ocean 
using a fleet of robotic instruments that drift with the ocean currents 
and move up and down between the surface and a mid-water level 
AVHRR Advanced Very-High Resolution Radiometer 
C3S Copernicus Climate Change Service 
CCI Climate Change Initiative 
CDR Climate Data Record 
DMI Danish Meteorological Institute 
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number 
ESA European Space Agency 
ICDR Interim Climate Data Record 
IST Ice Surface Temperature 
MAD Median Absolute Deviation 
OSTIA Operational Sea Surface Temperature and Ice Analysis 
OI Optimal Interpolation 
RSD Robust Standard Deviation 
SLSTR Sea and Land Surface Temperature Radiometer 
SST Sea Surface Temperature 
T2m Temperature at 2m height 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
Foundation SST The SST from which the diurnal cycle grows each day1 
MAD Median absolute deviation from the median 
Robust standard 
deviation (RSD) 
1.4826 × MAD

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a product user guide and quality information document for the Copernicus Climate Change Service's Level 4 Sea Surface Temperature (SST) analysis, version SST-GLO-SST-L4-REP-OBSERVATIONS-010-024, detailing changes and updates to the product since its creation in January 2017.
